entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target crop Cicer arietinum L. used in the study

entities.name: COLCHICINE
entities.description: Chemical agent used to induce autotetraploidy

entities.name: AUTOTETRAPLOIDY
entities.description: The state of having four sets of chromosomes induced in the plant

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: Application of colchicine to seeds to induce polyploidy

entities.name: SEEDLINGS
entities.description: The plant growth stage where colchicine treatment failed

entities.name: LEAF SIZE
entities.description: The size of leaves, which increased in autotetraploids

entities.name: FLOWER SIZE
entities.description: The size of flowers, which increased in autotetraploids

entities.name: STOMATA SIZE
entities.description: The size of stomata, which increased in autotetraploids

entities.name: POLLEN GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The size of pollen grains, which increased in autotetraploids

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The size of seeds, which increased in autotetraploids

entities.name: STAINABLE POLLEN PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of viable pollen, which was reduced in autotetraploids

entities.name: PODSET
entities.description: The number of pods set, which was reduced in autotetraploids

entities.name: MEIOSIS
entities.description: The process of cell division during gamete formation

entities.name: DIPLOID PARENT
entities.description: The original plant with two sets of chromosomes used for comparison
